title: Maiduguri, Borno — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Maiduguri, Borno: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Maiduguri is a city in Borno with a population of 1,197,000. The capital of Borno State in northeastern Nigeria, known for its strategic location on the Sahel trade routes.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
